hero.title: Jura Champi
hero.subtitle: Fresh mushroom producer in the Jura region

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Jura Champi was born in 2018 from a couple's passion for mushrooms and the lands of the Jura. After years in conventional agriculture, we decided to specialize in quality mushroom cultivation, favoring environmentally friendly methods.
story.paragraph2: Based in the heart of the Jura massif, we grow our mushrooms in natural caves that offer ideal humidity and temperature. This traditional approach, combined with modern know-how, allows us to offer exceptional products year-round.
story.paragraph3: Today, Jura Champi supplies the best restaurants in the region, school canteens committed to offering local products, and individuals through our delivery service. Our commitment: fresh mushrooms, locally grown, delivered with a smile.

clients.title: Who are our mushrooms for?
clients.restaurantsDesc: Fresh, quality products to enhance your dishes
clients.canteensDesc: Regular supplies for local, healthy meals
clients.individualsDesc: Home delivery for your everyday recipes

products.title: Our Mushrooms
products.subtitle: Fresh mushrooms grown with passion in the Jura

shiitake.name: Shiitake
shiitake.description: Shiitake, originally from Asia, is prized for its firm flesh and pronounced umami flavor. Perfect for stir-fries, soups and Asian dishes.

pleurote.name: Oyster Mushroom
pleurote.description: The oyster mushroom offers a delicate texture and mild flavor. Ideal pan-fried, in sauce or in risottos.

champignonParis.name: Button Mushroom
champignonParis.description: The timeless classic. Versatile and delicious, it adapts to all cuisines and can be enjoyed raw or cooked.

maitake.name: Maitake
maitake.description: Also called 'hen of the woods', maitake has a unique texture and woody notes. Excellent in fricassée or as a side dish.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: A question, an order? Don't hesitate to contact us.
